description_long: This is a hardcover book with a visually striking front cover featuring a group of uniformed soldiers in camouflage, holding rifles, set against a background of abstract colored shapes. The book is relatively thin, with a sturdy, glossy cover and a spine that displays the title and publication year in bold, gold and white text. The back cover shows a monochrome image of two soldiers crouched under a camouflaged net, suggesting a military or defense theme. The book appears to be a standard educational or instructional volume, likely intended for use in a classroom or training context. The edges are clean and the binding is tight, indicating a well-made, durable object. The overall color palette is dominated by dark grays, browns, and muted earth tones, with some lighter and gold accents.
description: A hardcover book with a military-themed cover showing soldiers, abstract colored shapes, and a monochrome back image. The spine is labeled with gold and white text, and the book is thin and sturdy.
description_view_0: The front cover displays a group of soldiers in camouflage with rifles, set against abstract colored shapes.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, showing its thin profile and the tightly bound pages.
description_view_2: The back cover features a monochrome image of two soldiers crouched under a camouflaged net.
description_view_3: The spine is visible, displaying the title and year in gold and white text on a dark background.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration on the front cover depicts a group of five soldiers in camouflage uniforms, holding rifles, with serious expressions. The background features abstract, curved shapes in muted blue, yellow, and brown tones, adding a dynamic and modern feel to the composition.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark gray with gold and white text running vertically, including the title and the year '2018' at the top. The design is simple and professional, with no decorative patterns.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, white, rectangular logo with a stylized letter or symbol is visible at the bottom of the front and back covers.
